hero.title: Accessibility project dil rawh
hero.lead: IATF chuan mamawhna dik tak aṭanga ṭan lâk, inawm theihna project dilte chu a enfiah ṭhîn a ni.
support: Hriat chianna kimchang i mamawh lo va, harsatna chiang tak, tu nge a nghawng a, engvângin nge a pawimawh tih i hriat phawt chuan a tâwk a ni.

actions.label: Chu ai chuan Discord hmang ang che

intro: Kawng tinte chu ennawn khatah an tel vek a ni.

items.label: Website
items.body: A hnuaia form-ah hian dilna chi hrang hrang thehluh theih a ni.

items.label: Email
items.body: Dilna hi direct-a thawn ang che {{contact.requestsEmail}}E-mail request-te chu enfiah leh tihdanglam a nih hnuin public request record-ah a chang thei ang.

items.label: Inlaichînna
items.body: A awlsam ber a nih chuan chuta ṭang chuan ṭan la.

guidance.title: Dilna i thawn hmain
paragraphs: IATF chuan mipui hmaah hna a thawk a. Dilna te chu a summary siam a, a public request records-ah te, he website ah te, a nih loh leh a pahnihah te chhuah theih a ni.
A ṭûl a, IATF-in a enchhin a rem tih loh chuan, mi mal address te, phone number te, damdawi lam chanchin kimchang te, leh ṭanpuitu technology hmangtu mi mal chanchin hriat theih te chu dah suh.
IATF chuan request record a chhuah hmain personal contact details a ṭûl loh chu a la bo ṭhîn a ni.

review.title: Rinhlelhna ennawn
paragraphs: Dilna thehluh chuan pawm a ni ngei dâwn tihna a ni lo.
IATF chuan an thil dilte chu an thil tum a tlinzia, an thil tih theihzia, a ṭangkaina, leh an thil siamte chu public repository-a dah a nih leh nih loh a enfiah a ni.
Dilna ṭhenkhat chu pawm a nih hma chuan hnawl a ni mai thei a, tihtawp emaw, tihdanglam emaw a ni thei bawk.

fields.name: extraContext
fields.label: Thupui dang
fields.helper: A ṭûlzia hrilhfiah thei thil dang: a pawimawh chhan te, entîrna te, reference te, software idea thûk te, a hun tiam chin te chu han sawi ve teh.

fields.name: openSourceConsent
fields.label: Public open source development chu nuam i ti em?
fields.helper: Project pawmte chu IATF hnuaia public repository a ni.
options: Hriat chian a la ni lo.

header.title: A awmzia chu pawm a ni

items: IATF GitHub organization chhunga public repository
a copy-left license code leh project material-te
public development in the repository (Repository-a mipuite tana hmasawnna)

header.title: A bul tan nân, dîlna tawi leh chiang tak chu a tâwk a ni

paragraphs: Accessibility ngai tak tak in nei a, mipuite project a nih tur nia in ngaih chuan min rawn thawn rawh u.
